notFound.title: We can’t find that page
notFound.description: The address may be wrong, or the page may have been moved. Check the link or start again from home.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.intro: Find answers to the most common questions about the simulation and the fleet.
faq.a1: The simulation checks whether your vehicle meets the conditions to join the fleet. You enter your details and get an immediate indication: approved, not approved, or manual review required.
faq.a2: When the result is unclear, a manual review is needed. You can submit a request via the "Ask manual review" button. Our team will review your case and get in touch.
faq.a3: Contact us via the details on the website. We are happy to help.

form.title: Run simulation
form.description: Enter the car details to check if this car can be admitted to the car sharing system.

form.errorValidSeats: Please enter a valid number of seats.
form.errorEnterDate: Please enter the first registration date.

intro.title: Welcome
intro.body: Thinking about sharing your car with others? Here you can check whether your car is eligible to join our fleet and get an estimate of how much you could earn. We'll ask you a few questions about your car and how you use it—it only takes a couple of minutes.

carChoice.title: What applies to you?
carChoice.subtitle: We'll tailor the next steps accordingly.
carChoice.newCarDescription: You're looking to buy a car and share it with the fleet.
carChoice.existingCar: I want to share my existing car
carChoice.existingCarDescription: You already own a car and want to see if it can join the fleet.

town.title: Where do you live?
town.description: Based on your location we can estimate how many km per year the car will be shared.
town.label: Town
town.cantSeeTownHelper: We currently only operate in Belgium. You can pick the closest town to yours, if you don't see your town in the list.

carDetails.title: Tell us about your car
carDetails.carTypePlaceholderFirst: Select brand and fuel type first

mileage.title: Mileage and registration
mileage.description: Current mileage and first registration date.
mileage.ownerKmPerYearHint: Adjust it if this doesn't match how many kilometres you actually drive each year.
mileage.ownerKmPerYearCalculated: Based on your mileage and first registration date, we estimate you drive about {value} km per year.
mileage.ownerKmPerYearEmpty: Fill in current mileage and first registration date above to see your estimated km per year.
mileage.ownerKmNewCarHint: Estimate how many km per year you expect to drive this car (personal use).
mileage.newCarDescription: Enter the purchase amount of the car, including VAT.

loading.title: Running simulation
loading.funny2: Teaching hamsters to turn the wheels…
loading.funny3: Counting the road stripes on the E40…
loading.funny4: Brewing a fresh pot of numbers…
loading.funny5: Consulting the oracle of parking spots…
loading.funny7: Checking if the car has done its homework…

results.successBody: Your car will most probably be allowed in the fleet.
results.notOkBody: Your car does not meet the parameters to join the fleet.
results.unclearBody: Your car would need a manual review before being allowed into the fleet.
results.enrollModalBody: This feature is not yet available.

situatie.title: Does your car fit Dégage?
situatie.body: Find out if your car is eligible for our sharing network — and what you could earn back with it.
situatie.tileHeeftDesc: I want to know if my current car is eligible.
situatie.tileKooptTitle: A car I'm planning to buy
situatie.tileKooptDesc: I want to know if a car I have in mind is eligible.
situatie.kooptBanner: Already bought the car? We'll arrange insurance as soon as possible. Not bought yet? Fill in the simulation so you know where you stand.
situatie.koopgidsTitle: Looking for a car that fits Dégage too?
situatie.koopgidsBody: Here's what we look at — so you know whether it's worth starting the simulation, or what to watch for when buying.
situatie.koopgidsKnockout4: No company cars and not (partly) claimed as business expenses
situatie.koopgidsIdealTitle: Ideal profile — at least 2 of 3 needed
situatie.koopgidsTipBody: Petrol and electric cars usually qualify more easily. The lower your running costs, the more you can earn back through Dégage.
situatie.koopgidsFooter: Already have a car in mind? Start the simulation above. Questions? Get in touch.

wageninfo.title: Tell us about your car
wageninfo.body: We only ask what's strictly needed for the simulation.
wageninfo.gemeenteHint: To estimate how much demand there is for shared cars in your area.
wageninfo.badgeGent: Ghent — high demand in your area
wageninfo.carTypePlaceholderFirst: Select brand and fuel type first
wageninfo.firstRegistrationHint: You can find this on the vehicle registration certificate.
wageninfo.firstRegistrationHelpAria: Help: where to find the first registration date
wageninfo.ownerKmEditedHint: You have manually set the estimated km per year. The automatic calculation will no longer update this value.

loading.title: Assessing…
loading.progressAriaLabel: Simulation in progress. The bar may take up to 45 seconds; your result can appear sooner.
loading.checkedValueSub: We estimated the market value of your car.

result.successTitle: Good news — your car is eligible
result.notOkIntro: Based on what you entered, your car does not meet the criteria.
result.notOkReasonDetail: The combination of value, age and consumption makes the cost per shared kilometre too high for our network in your area.
result.whatNextOtherCar: Got another car? Run a new simulation.
result.whatNextContact: Questions? Contact Dégage via the contact form.
result.manualReviewHint: Share your email and we’ll prioritise a manual review of your case.
result.manualReviewSent: Request received. We’ve saved your email and will get back to you.
result.manualReviewError: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact us.
result.manualReviewUnavailable: We couldn’t submit this request. Please contact Dégage.
result.disclaimer: This is a simulation. Final approval is after an info session and check by Dégage.
result.nextCta: See what you can earn back →

kosten.title: How much do neighbours pay?
kosten.introPart1: Your car is estimated to cost you
kosten.introPart2: in fixed costs (insurance + tax + maintenance + inspection). Depreciation is added per scenario. Below you can see how much of that you earn back through Dégage.
kosten.body: Your fixed car costs (insurance, tax, maintenance, inspection) are shown below. Depreciation is added per scenario. Each trip a neighbour makes pays a share back.
kosten.bodyWithTotal: Your fixed car costs (insurance, tax, maintenance, inspection) amount to € {total}/year. Depreciation is added per scenario. Each trip a neighbour makes pays a share back.
kosten.placeholder: Your car costs — to be filled with input and logic later.
kosten.scenarioWeinigSub: Car rarely free. Weekends seldom free.
kosten.scenarioRegelmatigSub: Car regularly free. Weekends sometimes free.
kosten.scenarioVaakSub: Car often free. Weekends + quick to respond.
kosten.scenarioHint: Click a scenario to see the calculation ↓
kosten.burenBetalingOf: of your total car costs of {total}
kosten.rittenPerYearSub: times someone borrows your car — ~{km} km shared per year.
kosten.mensenHelpBody: get access to a car without owning one themselves.
kosten.wagensReplaceBody: On average your car replaces {n} other cars in the street.
kosten.wagensMinderBody: Your car replaces on average {n} other cars in the street. So you help reduce parking pressure and create more liveable neighbourhoods.
kosten.quarterVarianceBody: In 4 out of 10 quarters there is little income. Plan your budget on the pessimistic scenario.
kosten.billingDataDisclaimer: Estimates based on billing data from 883 cars (≥4 quarters). Actual income depends on availability, demand in your area, and how quickly you respond.

bevestiging.title: Your simulation is ready
bevestiging.body: Leave your details and we'll send you a summary.
bevestiging.isMemberLabel: Are you already a Dégage member?
bevestiging.pathInfosessie: Yes, I already attended an owner info session
bevestiging.pathLid: I'm a member but haven't attended an owner info session yet
bevestiging.pathNieuw: No, I'm not a member yet
bevestiging.submitError: We couldn’t send the summary. Please try again.
bevestiging.submitUnavailable: Your session has no saved simulation. Go back and run the check again.
bevestiging.sentSubInfosessie: We'll be in touch soon. Welcome back!
bevestiging.sentSubLid: A staff member will contact you within 2 business days. Welcome back!
bevestiging.sentSubNieuw: A staff member will contact you within 2 business days.
bevestiging.sentSubRegularCar: We’ve sent your summary. We’ll be in touch if we need anything else.
bevestiging.whatNextRegularBody: Thanks for running the check. Keep an eye on your inbox for next steps from the team.
bevestiging.nieuwMemberHintRest: — it's free, can be done online, and takes 2 minutes. Then you can schedule an owner info session.
bevestiging.koopBannerBody: When you send your email summary on this page, we prioritise reviewing your case so your car can usually be onboarded within about 2 days.
bevestiging.lidStep1Meta: required, even as an existing member — different from the borrower info session

chat.emptyConversationDescription: You can ask any question about Dégage. Replies use your documentation when it helps.
